────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
>



















































────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2026-07-11 21:09:35 TRACE Doing not so important stuff priority="super low"
2026-07-11 21:09:35 DEBUG This might be interesting
                          ├ is this interesting=true
                          ├ when were crayons invented=1903
                          └ what is the meaning of life=42
2026-07-11 21:09:35 INFO  That was actually interesting such=wow
2026-07-11 21:09:35 WARN  Oh no, I see an error coming to us!
                          ├ speed=88
                          └ measures=mph
2026-07-11 21:09:35 ERROR Damn, here it is! error="something went wrong"
2026-07-11 21:09:35 INFO  But what's really cool is, that you can print
                          very long logs, and PTerm will automatically wrap
                          them for you! Say goodbye to text, that has weird
                          line breaks!
                          └ very=long

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2026-07-11 21:09:35 TRACE Doing not so important stuff priority="super low"
2026-07-11 21:09:35 DEBUG This might be interesting
                          ├ is this interesting=true
                          ├ when were crayons invented=1903
                          └ what is the meaning of life=42
2026-07-11 21:09:35 INFO  That was actually interesting such=wow
2026-07-11 21:09:35 WARN  Oh no, I see an error coming to us!
                          ├ speed=88
                          └ measures=mph
2026-07-11 21:09:35 ERROR Damn, here it is! error="something went wrong"
2026-07-11 21:09:35 INFO  But what's really cool is, that you can print
                          very long logs, and PTerm will automatically wrap
                          them for you! Say goodbye to text, that has weird
                          line breaks!
                          └ very=long
2026-07-11 21:09:37 FATAL Oh no, this process is getting killed! fatal=true
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

                          ├ is this interesting=true

                          └ what is the meaning of life=42

                          ├ speed=88
                          └ measures=mph

                          very long logs, and PTerm will automatically wrap
                          them for you! Say goodbye to text, that has weird

                          └ very=long
2026-07-11 21:09:37 FATAL Oh no, this process is getting killed! fatal=true
